previewPaused: Pro editor is open; tab preview is paused.
noTimelineHint: No edit timeline yet. Run editing_agent plan_edit_timeline first.
previewReadyHint: Edit preview will appear here when the timeline is ready.
ffmpegHint: FFmpeg not found. Run pip install -e . in the backend directory, or set SVG_FFMPEG_PATH / system PATH (Windows: winget install ffmpeg).
ffmpegHintShort: FFmpeg not found. Run pip install -e . in the backend directory, or set SVG_FFMPEG_PATH.
newTabTitle: Open this editor page in a new browser tab
exportNlePremiereHint: Export FCP7 XML package. After extracting the ZIP, import project.xml in Premiere Pro via File → Import.
exportSavedAndRevealed: Saved and revealed in file explorer
exportNleSavedAndRevealed: PR package saved and revealed in file explorer
exportSavedRevealFailed: File saved, but could not open folder: {{error}}
mediaHydrationFailedAll: Video media failed to load; preview unavailable. Check your network and retry.
mediaHydrationFailedPartial: Some video media failed to load; preview may be incomplete.
mediaHydrationBlockedExport: Media not fully loaded; export disabled until hydration succeeds.
audioHydrationFailedAll: Audio media failed to load; preview will be silent. Check your network and retry.
audioHydrationFailedPartial: Some audio media failed to load; preview may be silent or incomplete.
reloadTimelineTitle: Fetch edit timeline from server again
exportViaEditorHint: Export the final video from the Edit Assistant toolbar (browser render). Server-side FFmpeg export is disabled.
classicLoadHint: Ensure the API is reachable, WebAssembly is supported, and try Chrome.
